title: 高松宮記念の後に・才能の証明

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo is showered with praise as we reflect on
the great efforts that brought us here. She's
delighted that her talents have been conveyed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Soon after, King Halo encounters Kawakami
Princess in the waiting room, who excitedly states
her newfound desire to win the Takamatsunomiya
Kinen as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Having come to this realization herself not long ago, King Halo advises her to find what she really wants to do, and become first-rate at that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with that, King Halo sets her sights on the
Yasuda Kinen. With no intention of stopping, she
looks ahead with a fearless smile.
